title: SIX60: Till the Lights Go Out
original_title: SIX60: Till the Lights Go Out
overview: SIX60 are a phenomenon. In the history of New Zealand culture, no musical act has ever garnered such a wide connection with fans. Their incredible story, from a Dunedin student band to becoming the first and only Kiwi act to headline Western Springs Stadium in front of 50,000 fans, will surprise even the band’s most ardent followers. For the first time, SIX60 open up about their personal battles, the lack of critical acceptance and the challenges of staying together.
